title: Chill with 1.20
description: A small modpack featuring the latest 1.20 mods
body:
# A small modpack with some of the available mods of 1.20 within the first hours of launch
## [![A mushroom-head robot](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1093063068537327686/1094715810955673730/casmin7.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=280)

# Have fun!
